title: Smart Fleet Tracking for Global Logistics
challenge: Apex Freight struggled with blind spots in their cross-country delivery routes. Their legacy GPS system suffered from severe latency, and they had no visibility into vehicle diagnostics, leading to unexpected breakdowns and delayed shipments.
solution: Momentaj designed a custom IoT architecture. We installed edge-computing sensors in the fleet, streaming telemetry and real-time location data to a centralized cloud dashboard. We also integrated this data directly into their existing Salesforce instance for automated dispatching.
results:
### The Impact
* **30% Reduction** in unexpected vehicle maintenance costs.
* **99.9% Uptime** on location tracking.
* Improved customer satisfaction by providing highly accurate delivery ETAs.

title: Enterprise CRM Migration & Customization
challenge: The client was outgrowing their basic CRM, resulting in siloed data between sales and support teams, and a manual, error-prone reporting process.
solution: We executed a full migration to Salesforce Financial Services Cloud. We built custom Lightning Web Components (LWC) to give advisors a unified view of client portfolios and automated their compliance reporting using Flow.
results:
### The Impact
* **40% Increase** in advisor productivity.
* Eliminated manual data entry errors entirely.
* Enabled real-time pipeline visibility for the executive team.
